TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marie-Louise_Coleiro_Preca, title = Marie-Louise_Coleiro_Preca, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marie-Louise_Coleiro_Preca} }

S.FORM: == Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca == ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 12, Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Malta ta' misuw hya' ga Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Marie-Louise sa kawas 1998, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca == ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 12, Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Malta ta' misuw hya' ga Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Marie-Louise sa kawas 1998, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == marie-louis~ɕe ʦ~ʨoleiro preʦ~ʨa == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, marie-louis~ɕe ʦ~ʨoleiro preʦ~ʨa, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw malta taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa marie-louis~ɕe ʦ~ʨoleiro preʦ~ʨa, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja marie-louis~ɕe s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
